## Type of Change

<!-- Please delete options that are not relevant. -->

- [ ] `feat` (New feature)
- [ ] `fix` (Bug fix)
- [ ] `docs` (Documentation update)
- [ ] `refactor` (Refactoring/reorganizing code)
- [ ] `style` (Formatting change)
- [ ] `perf` (Performance optimization)
- [ ] `test` (Adding or correcting tests)
- [ ] `build` / `ci` (Build system / CI changes)
- [ ] `chore` (Maintenance/dependency update)

---

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style and guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` locally and resolved any issues.
- [ ] I have run `npm run build` locally and verified that the build succeeds.
- [ ] I have added/updated tests if applicable, and verified they pass.
- [ ] My commits follow the Conventional Commit principles outlined in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (under `docs/` or inline JSDocs) to match my changes.
